---
title: "diabetes_modeling_korea"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

## Importing data

```{r}
# loading danish inputs, sex, LOD, BPS percentiles & diabetes incidence
# maybe name tít better :-)
# doing lognormal distribution
df <- read_excel("diabetes work china-kopi.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    meanlog_dk = log(p_50),
    sdlog_dk   = (log(p_75) - log(p_25)) / (qnorm(0.75) - qnorm(0.25))
  )
```

## Korean study inputs, BPS and diabetes

```{r}
# Supplementary Table S6: DM ORs among participants with BPS > LOD
OR_t2  <- 1.73
LCL_t2 <- 1.00
UCL_t2 <- 2.98

OR_t3  <- 2.13
LCL_t3 <- 1.29
UCL_t3 <- 3.50

# Convert 95% CI to log-scale SE
# simulating uncertainty
se_t2 <- (log(UCL_t2) - log(LCL_t2)) / (2 * 1.96)
se_t3 <- (log(UCL_t3) - log(LCL_t3)) / (2 * 1.96)

# Supplementary Table S1: Korean detectable BPS distribution (> LOD)
# min = 0.019, p25 = 0.029, p50 = 0.049, p75 = 0.104, max = 35.603
meanlog_kor <- log(0.049)
sdlog_kor   <- (log(0.104) - log(0.029)) / (qnorm(0.75) - qnorm(0.25))

# Reconstructed Korean tertile cutpoints from fitted detectable distribution
# finding 33rd and 66th percentile
cut_t1_t2 <- qlnorm(1/3, meanlog_kor, sdlog_kor)
cut_t2_t3 <- qlnorm(2/3, meanlog_kor, sdlog_kor)
```

## Duration inputs for YLD

```{r}
# Median age at onset of type 2 diabetes in DK
age_m <- 62.1
age_f <- 64.6

# Life expectancy in DK
life_m <- 78.8
life_f <- 82.8

# estimating the duration
D_m <- life_m - age_m
D_f <- life_f - age_f

# adding to dataframe
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    D_years = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Male")   ~ D_m,
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ D_f,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

## Inputs for YLL 

```{r}
# deaths and diabetes from GBD (DK + T2D)
deaths_f <- 566.89
deaths_m <- 715.34

yll_f <- 7837.82
yll_m <- 12702.54

# calculating standard expected years of life lost
seyll_f <- yll_f / deaths_f
seyll_m <- yll_m / deaths_m

# adding to dataframe
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    deaths = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ deaths_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male")   ~ deaths_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    seyll = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ seyll_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male")   ~ seyll_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

## Disability weight inputs

```{r}
# Uncomplicated diabetes mellitus type 2
DW_mode <- 0.049011415
DW_min  <- 0.0311213425
DW_max  <- 0.072092547
```

## Helper functions

```{r}
# PERT distribution for disability weight uncertainty
rpert <- function(n, min, mode, max) {
  alpha <- 1 + 4 * (mode - min) / (max - min)
  beta  <- 1 + 4 * (max - mode) / (max - min)
  min + rbeta(n, alpha, beta) * (max - min)
}

# Categorical PAF
paf_cat <- function(p, rr) {
  sumterm <- sum(p * (rr - 1))
  sumterm / (1 + sumterm)
}
```

## Monte Carlo

```{r}
run_mc_row_daly_korea <- function(i_diabetes,
                                  meanlog_dk,
                                  sdlog_dk,
                                  lod_dk,
                                  D_years,
                                  deaths,
                                  seyll,
                                  DW_min,
                                  DW_mode,
                                  DW_max,
                                  nsim = 10000,
                                  baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  # Simulate Danish BPS exposure
  X <- rlnorm(nsim, meanlog = meanlog_dk, sdlog = sdlog_dk)

  # Restrict to Danish detectable values
  # diabetes association only used among participants with BPS above LOD
  X_det <- X[X > lod_dk]

  # NA if failing
  if (length(X_det) < 10) {
    return(tibble(
      p_detectable = NA_real_,
      p_t1 = NA_real_,
      p_t2 = NA_real_,
      p_t3 = NA_real_,
      rr2 = NA_real_,
      rr3 = NA_real_,
      PAF = NA_real_,
      AC = NA_real_,
      AD = NA_real_,
      YLD = NA_real_,
      YLL = NA_real_,
      DALY = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  # Classify detectable Danish exposures using reconstructed Korean tertiles
  grp <- case_when(
    X_det <= cut_t1_t2 ~ "T1",
    X_det <= cut_t2_t3 ~ "T2",
    TRUE               ~ "T3"
  )

  # calculating proportions
  p1 <- mean(grp == "T1")
  p2 <- mean(grp == "T2")
  p3 <- mean(grp == "T3")

  # Sample OR uncertainty once per iteration
  # OR is used here as an approximation to RR
  rr2 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t2), sd = se_t2))
  rr3 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t3), sd = se_t3))

  

  # Attributable incident diabetes cases
  base_cases <- if (baseline_uncertainty) {
    rpois(1, lambda = i_diabetes)
  } else {
    i_diabetes
  }

  AC <- PAF * base_cases

  # YLD
  DW  <- rpert(1, DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max)
  YLD <- AC * D_years * DW

  # YLL
  # Assumption: the same attributable fraction applies to diabetes deaths
  AD  <- PAF * deaths
  YLL <- AD * seyll

  # DALY
  DALY <- YLD + YLL

  tibble(
    p_detectable = p_detectable,
    p_t1 = p1,
    p_t2 = p2,
    p_t3 = p3,
    rr2 = rr2,
    rr3 = rr3,
    PAF = PAF,
    AC = AC,
    AD = AD,
    YLD = YLD,
    YLL = YLL,
    DALY = DALY
  )
}
```

```{r}
run_mc_summary_daly_korea <- function(i_diabetes,
                                      meanlog_dk,
                                      sdlog_dk,
                                      lod_dk,
                                      D_years,
                                      deaths,
                                      seyll,
                                      DW_min,
                                      DW_mode,
                                      DW_max,
                                      nsim_outer = 3000,
                                      baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  sims <- map_dfr(seq_len(nsim_outer), ~ run_mc_row_daly_korea(
    i_diabetes = i_diabetes,
    meanlog_dk = meanlog_dk,
    sdlog_dk   = sdlog_dk,
    lod_dk     = lod_dk,
    D_years    = D_years,
    deaths     = deaths,
    seyll      = seyll,
    DW_min     = DW_min,
    DW_mode    = DW_mode,
    DW_max     = DW_max,
    nsim       = 10000,
    baseline_uncertainty = baseline_uncertainty
  ))

  tibble(
    p_detectable_med = median(sims$p_detectable, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t1_med         = median(sims$p_t1, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t2_med         = median(sims$p_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t3_med         = median(sims$p_t3, na.rm = TRUE),

    PAF_med = median(sims$PAF, na.rm = TRUE),
    PAF_lo  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    PAF_hi  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    AC_med = median(sims$AC, na.rm = TRUE),
    AC_lo  = quantile(sims$AC, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    AC_hi  = quantile(sims$AC, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    AD_med = median(sims$AD, na.rm = TRUE),
    AD_lo  = quantile(sims$AD, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    AD_hi  = quantile(sims$AD, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    YLD_med = median(sims$YLD, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLD_lo  = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLD_hi  = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    YLL_med = median(sims$YLL, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLL_lo  = quantile(sims$YLL, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLL_hi  = quantile(sims$YLL, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    DALY_med = median(sims$DALY, na.rm = TRUE),
    DALY_lo  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    DALY_hi  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
results_daly_korea <- df %>%
  mutate(
    mc = pmap(
      list(i_diabetes, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, LOD, D_years, deaths, seyll),
      ~ run_mc_summary_daly_korea(
        i_diabetes = ..1,
        meanlog_dk = ..2,
        sdlog_dk   = ..3,
        lod_dk     = ..4,
        D_years    = ..5,
        deaths     = ..6,
        seyll      = ..7,
        DW_min     = DW_min,
        DW_mode    = DW_mode,
        DW_max     = DW_max,
        nsim_outer = 3000,
        baseline_uncertainty = FALSE
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(mc)

results_daly_korea
```

```{r}
print(cut_t1_t2)
print(cut_t2_t3)
```
